title: Kids Create - A4 Paper - Sketch Book - A4 Sketch Pad - Drawing Paper - Craft Paper - Art Paper - 30 Sheet A4 Bright Paper Pad - Arts and Crafts for Kids
features: KIDS CREATE COLOURING BOOK: At Kids Create, they're dedicated to design the very best art and craft kits for kids, to open their eyes to the world of art and keeping their minds busy. This coloured paper pad is perfect for you and your children to experiment with. This summer, why not get creative and make magic together?

ARTS AND CRAFTS FOR KIDS: Complete your art set with this fabulous coloured paper pad. The possibilities for this pad are endless. Use it as a A4 sketchbook, or as colour paper to cut and create beautiful colourful masterpieces for your scrapbook or use it for origami paper. Get creative and let your imagination run wild with this stunning coloured pad

DRAWING PAD FOR KIDS: This coloured plain paper pad come with 30 sheets, in three different colours. You have red paper, blue paper and yellow paper, all of high quality and vibrant. It is covered with a thick cardboard layer, to keep your paper protected and precision for whenever you want to use it. This art pad will be the perfect addition to your art kit for your kids

KIDS CREATE RANGE: Kids Create range of arts and crafts supplies are perfect for you to build your stationery set with. This kids drawing pad would go wonderfully with our act bumper activity bundle or our colouring set. Shop their range today to create fun activities for you and your children to enjoy together

KIDS CREATE: At Kids Create, they aim to design products that will inspire and encourage your children to dive into the world of arts and crafts and find their inner artist. All their products are designed with safety in mind and come with clear instruction for you and your family to use. Whether you want to create a glow in the dark gloop, help to learn your spellings or activities for either every day or the festive period, Kids Create has it all
